author: claude-dns-fix
content: Plan: Implement is_dns_error predicate in browser_manager.py. Prior commit dc14497 incorrectly skips both failure_count AND restart_required. The spec requires only failure_count be skipped (REQ-3: restart_required must still be set True). Will also add scale test (AC-4: 100+ non-existent domains) and unit test (AC-5: non-DNS neterrors still count).
